name: Dyslexia Friendly
description: Designed for readability with larger spacing and dyslexia-optimized fonts.

preview.sampleText: Optimized for clarity with generous spacing and readable fonts.

classes.h1: text-3xl font-bold mb-6 text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100 leading-loose
classes.h2: text-2xl font-bold mb-5 text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100 leading-loose
classes.h3: text-xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200 leading-relaxed
classes.h4: text-lg font-bold mb-3 text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200 leading-relaxed
classes.p: mb-4 text-lg text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200 leading-loose tracking-wide
classes.a: text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-500 dark:hover:text-blue-300 underline decoration-2 underline-offset-4
classes.li: mb-3 text-lg text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200 leading-loose tracking-wide
classes.tr: border-2 border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 even:bg-yellow-50 dark:even:bg-gray-800 odd:bg-white dark:odd:bg-gray-900
classes.th: border-2 border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 p-3 bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-900/40 font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-blue-400 dark:border-blue-500 pl-6 italic my-6 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/20 py-3 rounded-r text-lg
classes.code: bg-yellow-100 dark:bg-gray-800 px-2 py-1 rounded font-mono text-base text-gray-800 dark:text-yellow-200
classes.pre: bg-yellow-50 dark:bg-gray-800 p-6 rounded overflow-x-auto border-2 border-yellow-200 dark:border-gray-600 text-base leading-loose
